evals.prompt: We have been working from `.agents/scratchpad/feature-auth/plan.md` and already finished the tests phase. The next agent should continue with `src/auth/service.ts` and keep the existing AGENTS.md rules in mind. Use /save-session to save a concise continuation note for the next session.
evals.expected_output: Creates a concise, feature-scoped /save-session at `.agents/scratchpad/feature-auth/save-session.md` that captures current status, constraints, relevant files, and the next step.
expectations: Chooses `.agents/scratchpad/feature-auth/save-session.md` instead of the root scratchpad path.
Invokes or explicitly follows addy-context-engineering before deciding what context to save.
Writes the /save-session using the required sections: Goal, Current Status, Decisions and Constraints, Relevant Files, Open Questions or Blockers, Recommended Next Step.
Relevant Files entries include a short reason each path matters.
The summary stays concise and does not turn into a transcript or raw log dump.

evals.prompt: No scratchpad spec or plan exists yet. This session narrowed a bug in `scripts/sync.sh` to a missing environment variable, but we are stopping before the fix. Use /save-session to save a continuation note for a future agent session.
evals.expected_output: Creates `.agents/scratchpad/save-session.md` with a concise bug-focused /save-session that preserves the blocker and next step without inventing a feature folder.
expectations: Chooses the default path `.agents/scratchpad/save-session.md` when no feature-scoped scratchpad spec or plan is in context.
Invokes or explicitly follows addy-context-engineering before choosing what to preserve.
Captures the blocker or open question clearly enough for the next agent to resume.
Includes a concrete recommended next step instead of ending with a generic summary.

evals.prompt: We only have `.agents/scratchpad/feature-export/spec.md` so far and want another agent session to continue from there. Save a /save-session now that summarizes the goal, current status, relevant files, and the next move.
evals.expected_output: Creates `.agents/scratchpad/feature-export/save-session.md`, using the spec's feature subfolder even though no plan exists yet.
expectations: Recognizes that a scratchpad spec file is enough to select the feature-scoped output path.
Writes the /save-session beside the spec as `.agents/scratchpad/feature-export/save-session.md`.
Keeps the /save-session continuation-oriented, with the next step anchored to the active feature context.
